creator: vladimir.chukharev@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 175734
Patch

Update www/py-django-allauth from 0.27.0 to 0.28.0. Fixes a security flaw, see
https://github.com/pennersr/django-allauth/blob/master/ChangeLog.rst

The patched port passes all usual ports QA tests, including a build by poudriere in a 10Samd64 jail.
